tests.scenario: Show trial terms before payment confirmation
steps: Open onboarding and navigate to the subscription selection screen.
Choose a plan that includes a free trial.
View the payment confirmation screen before confirming payment.
tests.expected_result: The screen shows the trial length, renewal price, billing period, and automatic renewal behavior before the user confirms payment.

tests.scenario: Show paid plan terms before payment confirmation
steps: Open the subscription selection screen.
Select a paid annual or monthly plan with no trial.
View the payment confirmation screen before confirming payment.
tests.expected_result: The screen shows the exact price, billing period, and renewal behavior before the user confirms payment.

tests.scenario: Display active trial status in account settings
steps: Sign in with an account that is currently in a free trial.
Open account settings.
Open the subscription section.
tests.expected_result: The subscription section shows that a trial is active, includes the next billing date, identifies the billing source, and explains how the user can cancel.

tests.scenario: Display active paid subscription details
steps: Sign in with an account that has an active paid subscription.
Open account settings.
Open the subscription section.
tests.expected_result: The subscription section shows the current paid plan state, the next billing date, the billing source, and the cancellation method.

tests.scenario: Confirm cancellation in the same flow
steps: Sign in with an account that has an active trial or paid subscription.
Open the cancellation flow and confirm cancellation.
Stay within the same account flow after the action completes.
tests.expected_result: The app shows a cancellation confirmation message and updates the account state to canceled within the same user flow.

tests.scenario: Preserve canceled status after reopening account
steps: Cancel an active subscription or trial.
Close and reopen the app, then sign back into the same account if needed.
Open account settings and view the subscription section again.
tests.expected_result: The subscription section still shows the canceled status and retains visible confirmation that cancellation was completed.

tests.scenario: Route app store billing issues to the matching help path
steps: Sign in with an account billed through an app store.
Open billing help from the account or support area.
Select an issue related to refund or payment problems.
tests.expected_result: The app identifies the app store as the billing source and presents the matching refund or payment support path.

tests.scenario: Route direct billing issues to the matching help path
steps: Sign in with an account billed directly by the service.
Open billing help from the account or support area.
Select an issue related to refund or payment problems.
tests.expected_result: The app identifies direct billing as the payment source and presents the matching refund or payment support path.

tests.scenario: Launch successfully from a cold start
steps: Install the app on a supported device.
Open the app from the device launcher.
Wait for the main screen to finish loading.
tests.expected_result: The app loads to the main home screen without crashing or freezing.

tests.scenario: Launch successfully after app restart
steps: Open the app once and then fully close it.
Open the app again from the device launcher.
Wait for the main screen to finish loading.
tests.expected_result: The app returns to the main home screen without crashing or freezing after restart.

tests.scenario: Navigate across core screens in one session
steps: Open the app and load the home screen.
Navigate to the sleep section and then to a meditation content page.
Return to the home screen.
tests.expected_result: All screens remain responsive and the app does not require a restart.

tests.scenario: Repeat navigation without freezing
steps: Open the app and move between home, sleep, and meditation screens multiple times.
Use back navigation and tab navigation during the same session.
Continue interacting with each screen.
tests.expected_result: The app remains responsive during repeated navigation and does not freeze or force a restart.

tests.scenario: Show recoverable error state when content fails to load
steps: Open a content screen that cannot load because of a simulated service failure.
Wait for the failure to be detected.
Observe the screen state.
tests.expected_result: The app shows an error state with a retry action instead of leaving the user on a blank, frozen, or broken screen.

tests.scenario: Recover content loading through retry
steps: Open a content screen while the first load attempt fails.
Restore the connection or service availability.
Tap the retry action in the error state.
tests.expected_result: The content screen loads after retry and the user can continue without restarting the app.

tests.scenario: Play a streamed meditation from start to finish
steps: Start a meditation session that requires a network connection.
Keep the connection available and do not pause or stop playback.
Wait until the session reaches its end.
tests.expected_result: The meditation audio continues for the full session duration and ends only when the content is complete.

tests.scenario: Play a meditation with the screen locked
steps: Start a meditation session.
Lock the device screen while playback continues.
Wait until the session reaches its end without pausing it.
tests.expected_result: The meditation audio continues while the screen is locked and finishes only when the session ends.

tests.scenario: Show playback failure state in the same meditation session
steps: Start a meditation session.
Trigger a playback interruption such as a simulated playback error.
Observe the app without leaving the session.
tests.expected_result: The app shows a playback failure state in the same session and includes a resume action.

tests.scenario: Resume from the last known playback position
steps: Start a meditation session and let it play beyond the beginning.
Trigger a playback interruption and then activate the resume action.
Observe where playback restarts.
tests.expected_result: Playback resumes from the last played point rather than restarting from the beginning.

tests.scenario: Play downloaded meditation while fully offline
steps: Download a meditation session for offline use.
Place the device in airplane mode.
Start the downloaded session.
tests.expected_result: The downloaded session plays without showing an offline or buffering error.

tests.scenario: Play downloaded meditation with network disabled
steps: Download a meditation session for offline use.
Disable Wi Fi and mobile data while leaving the device out of airplane mode.
Start the downloaded session.
tests.expected_result: The downloaded session starts and plays without requiring a live connection.

tests.scenario: Keep Sleepcast playing with the screen turned off
steps: Start a Sleepcast on a supported device.
Turn off the device screen.
Wait through normal playback time without manually stopping the audio.
tests.expected_result: The Sleepcast continues to play while the screen is off until the content ends or the user stops it.

tests.scenario: Keep soundscape playback active during supported idle use
steps: Start a soundscape or other bedtime audio track on a supported device.
Let the device enter its supported idle state with the screen off.
Observe playback until the track ends.
tests.expected_result: The bedtime audio keeps playing during supported idle use and does not stop when the screen turns off.

tests.scenario: Avoid vibration after sleep audio has started
steps: Start a Sleepcast or soundscape.
Return to the sleep section during the same session.
Observe whether the app vibrates.
tests.expected_result: The app does not vibrate after sleep audio has started unless vibration feedback was enabled in settings.

tests.scenario: Avoid blocking prompts during an active sleep session
steps: Start sleep audio.
Navigate back to the sleep section while playback continues.
Observe whether a blocking prompt interrupts the flow.
tests.expected_result: The app does not show a blocking prompt during the active sleep session unless the user enabled that feedback.

tests.scenario: Browse sleep content by content type
steps: Open the sleep section of the app.
Open the available filter or category controls.
Choose one content type such as Sleepcast or soundscape.
tests.expected_result: The sleep library updates to show content that matches the selected content type.

tests.scenario: Browse sleep content by sound theme
steps: Open the sleep section of the app.
Open the available filter or category controls.
Choose one sound theme such as rain or ocean.
tests.expected_result: The sleep library updates to show content that matches the selected sound theme.

tests.scenario: Show guided content categories for common needs
steps: Open the library or browse area.
Look for guided content categories or entry points.
Review the available need based categories.
tests.expected_result: The library includes categories or entry points for stress, sleep, grief, and daily practice.

tests.scenario: Find guided content for a specific need through search or browse
steps: Open the library.
Search for or browse to one need such as grief support.
Review the results shown for that need.
tests.expected_result: The app shows guided content that corresponds to the selected need and keeps it grouped under a matching category or entry point.

tests.scenario: Record a completed session in user history
steps: Complete a meditation session while signed in.
Open the progress, history, or account area.
Review the latest completed activity.
tests.expected_result: The completed session appears in the user history or progress view.

tests.scenario: Preserve routine progress after reopening the app
steps: Complete sessions across multiple days on the same account.
Close and reopen the app.
Open the progress, history, or milestone view.
tests.expected_result: The app shows session history or milestone progress that matches the completed sessions after the app is reopened.
